hero.title: Intermarkt Family
hero.subtitle: Our Story
hero.description: For 15 years, we have been proud to deliver halal, fresh, and quality products to families across the country right to their doorstep.

story.title: Our Story
story.paragraph1: Our journey began in 2009 with a small store in Istanbul, shaped by the vision of understanding our customers' needs and providing them with the highest quality service.
story.paragraph2: With our sensitivity to halal nutrition and fresh product quality, we made a difference and quickly gained the trust of our customers. Today we are proud to serve 100,000+ happy customers in 50+ cities.
story.paragraph3: By blending technology and traditional values, we offer a modern shopping experience while maintaining family warmth.

missionVision.title: Mission & Vision
missionVision.subtitle: Our goals and values for the future

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To provide families easy access to halal, fresh, and quality food products. To provide reliable and fast service with customer satisfaction as our priority.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To become the most trusted and preferred online marketplace platform. To become a brand that adds value to society and the environment through sustainable growth.

values.title: Our Values
values.subtitle: The fundamental principles that shape our work culture

customerFocus.title: Customer Focus
customerFocus.description: Customer satisfaction is our priority in every decision we make. We are here for you 24/7 with our support service.

trustTransparency.title: Trust & Transparency
trustTransparency.description: We earn your trust with transparent pricing, secure payment, and quality guarantee.

sustainability.title: Sustainability
sustainability.description: We protect the future by supporting eco-friendly packaging and local producers.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: By combining technology and quality, we continuously improve the shopping experience.

items.title: Foundation
items.description: Opened our first store in Istanbul

team.title: Our Leadership Team
team.subtitle: The experienced team that leads Intermarkt into the future

cta.title: Join the Intermarkt Family
cta.description: Join our 100,000+ happy customers. Experience the shopping experience full of halal, fresh, and quality products.

agbPage.title: General Terms and Conditions of Sale
agbPage.subtitle: General terms of services offered to Intermarkt customers

general.title: General Provisions
general.content1: These General Terms and Conditions of Sale apply to all sales transactions made through the online shopping platform operated by Intermarkt.
general.content2: By placing an order through the platform, you are deemed to have accepted these terms. Intermarkt reserves the right to change the terms.

order.title: Order and Contract Formation
order.content1: An order placed by the customer constitutes an offer for a sales contract. The contract is formed upon confirmation of the order by Intermarkt.
order.content2: Order confirmation is communicated to the customer via email or SMS. Orders may be rejected due to stock availability or other reasons.

pricing.title: Prices and Payment
pricing.content1: Prices stated on the site are in Euros and include VAT. The right to change prices is reserved.
pricing.content2: Payment can be made by credit card, debit card, or cash payment. Payment security is ensured with SSL certificate.

delivery.title: Delivery
delivery.content1: Products are delivered to the specified delivery address. Delivery time is 1-3 business days from order confirmation.
delivery.content2: If the customer or authorized person is not present during delivery, the product is returned to the warehouse and a re-delivery fee is charged.

return.title: Return and Exchange
return.content1: Food products cannot be returned for hygiene reasons. Other products can be returned within 14 days of delivery date.
return.content2: Products to be returned must be in original packaging and unused condition. Return shipping costs are borne by the customer.

liability.title: Liability
liability.content1: Intermarkt pays utmost attention to product quality and safety. However, it is not responsible for damages arising from product use.
liability.content2: Service interruptions may occur during technical failures or force majeure situations. No liability is accepted for damages arising from such situations.

law.title: Applicable Law and Jurisdiction
law.content1: Turkish Law applies to this contract. Istanbul courts have jurisdiction in case of disputes.
law.content2: Customer complaints are first evaluated by customer service. Consumer arbitration committees can be appealed to for unresolved cases.

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.subtitle: Information about the protection and processing of your personal data

hero.title: Life is Easier with {{brand}}
hero.subtitle: With 15 years of experience, we serve 100,000+ happy customers. We add value to your table with halal, fresh and quality products.

values.title: Our Values
values.subtitle: We make a difference in the industry with our customer satisfaction-oriented approach and quality understanding.

customerSatisfaction.title: Customer Satisfaction
customerSatisfaction.description: The satisfaction of each of our customers is our priority. We provide 7/24 support and quality service.

secureShop.title: Secure Shopping
secureShop.description: Secure shopping experience with SSL certificate, secure payment systems and data protection.

naturalHalal.title: Natural & Halal
naturalHalal.description: We support healthy living with halal certified, organic and natural products.

fastDelivery.title: Fast Delivery
fastDelivery.description: We meet your urgent needs with same-day delivery option.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Services designed for modern shopping experience

express.title: Express Delivery
express.description: 2 hours within Istanbul, 24 hours outside the city at your door

freshGuarantee.title: Fresh Product Guarantee
freshGuarantee.description: Fresh products with minimum 7 days expiration date

easyReturn.title: Easy Return
easyReturn.description: Unconditional return within 14 days, pickup from your door

support.title: 7/24 Customer Support
support.description: Always by your side, professional support team

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Here are the answers to your questions. Contact our support team for more information.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Our 7/24 professional support team is ready to help you

cta.title: Start Shopping Now!
cta.subtitle: Join the Intermarkt family with 50,000+ product variety, same day delivery and special discounts.

deliveryPage.title: Delivery Terms and Conditions
deliveryPage.subtitle: Detailed terms of Intermarkt delivery services

regions.title: Delivery Areas
regions.content1: Intermarkt delivery service is offered in Istanbul and surrounding provinces. Delivery areas are continuously expanding.

times.title: Delivery Times
times.content1: Delivery times start after order confirmation and are planned as follows:

fast.title: Fast Delivery
fast.description: Same day delivery (Orders placed by 2:00 PM)

fees.title: Delivery Fees
fees.content1: Delivery fees are determined by order amount and delivery speed:

hours.title: Delivery Hours
hours.content1: Our delivery service is offered 7 days a week during the following hours:

process.title: Delivery Process
process.content1: Our delivery process is customer satisfaction oriented:

steps.title: Order Preparation
steps.description: Your order is prepared from the warehouse and passes quality control

steps.title: Departure
steps.description: Courier departs to delivery address, you will be notified via SMS

steps.title: Delivery
steps.description: Products are delivered to your address, receipt is signed

unavailable.title: Not Available During Delivery
unavailable.description: If no one is present at the delivery address, the product is returned to the warehouse. A fee of 9.99€ is charged for re-delivery.

weather.title: Weather Conditions
weather.description: Delivery delays may occur during adverse weather conditions. Customers will be informed in such cases.

coldChain.title: Cold Chain Products
coldChain.description: Frozen and cold products are transported with special vehicles. Product quality is guaranteed.

rights.title: Customer Rights
rights: You can refuse delivery of damaged products
You will be informed via SMS before delivery
You can request delivery time changes
You have the right to complain in case of late delivery

asap.title: As Soon As Possible
asap.description: Your order will be prepared as soon as possible

scheduled.title: Scheduled Order
scheduled.description: Place order by specifying date and time

checkoutSteps.completePreviousSteps: To proceed to this step, you need to complete the previous steps first.

storeOffline.title: Store is Currently Closed
storeOffline.description: Sorry, our store is currently not serving. Please check our opening hours and try again.
storeOffline.autoOpen: You can automatically continue shopping when the store opens.

impressumPage.title: Impressum
impressumPage.subtitle: Legal information according to § 5 TMG

businessPurpose.title: Business Purpose
businessPurpose.description: IM Lebensmittel GmbH is a trading company based in Frankfurt am Main.
activities: Import and distribution of food products

disputeResolution.title: Online Dispute Resolution
disputeResolution.description: The European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution (ODR):
disputeResolution.noteText: We are not prepared or obligated to participate in dispute resolution procedures before a consumer arbitration board.

applicableLaw.title: Applicable Law
applicableLaw.description: German law applies to this website and all legal relationships between us and users.
applicableLaw.jurisdiction: The place of jurisdiction is Frankfurt am Main, as far as legally permissible.

impressumPage.copyright: © 2024 IM Lebensmittel GmbH. All rights reserved.
impressumPage.contactNote: For questions about this legal notice, contact:
